basic_details.job_title: BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute
basic_details.short_information: BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (BRIC THSTI) has released the Apprentice Notification 2026 on 12 May 2026 on the official website thsti.res.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates within the age limit range who have a Diploma or Graduation in relevant fields are eligible to apply for these Apprentice vacancies. The online application process for BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 has started on 12 May 2026 and will remain open until 02 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notificatio

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Biotechnology: B.Tech/BE/B.Sc in Life Sciences. Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Information Technology: Graduation in Computer Science/Information Technology/Computer Application or allied subjects OR Diploma in IT/Computer Science or Computer Application or allied subjects. Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Civil Engineering: Graduation in Civil Engineering or allied subjects OR Diploma in Engineering (Civil or allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Electrical and Equipment Maintenance: Graduation in Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation Engineering OR Diploma in Engineering (allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.9,000/- for Graduates and Rs.8,000/- for Diploma holders
salary_details.details: Biotechnology: Rs.9,000/- per month Information Technology: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month Civil Engineering: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month Electrical and Equipment Maintenance: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month

selection_process: Short-listing based on eligibility criteria Application submission through NATS portal
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BRIC THSTI to complete the application.
